text: Upon entering this clean, modern space with glass walls and minimalistic decor, I feel a cool detachment and sense of anticipation. The environment is precise and orderly, almost clinical, encouraging contemplation about the intersection of function and aesthetics. Moving into the exhibit area marked R+D, I am struck by vibrant colors and bold text, immersing me in an atmosphere of curiosity and innovation. I feel a gentle excitement, surrounded by the promise of research and development—how ideas are born and take shape. Here, I sense both the comfort of order and the spark of human creativity, inviting me to reflect on the very nature of progress and discovery.
